infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs camera access to capture your travel photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs your location to tag entries with your current address.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Travel Diary sends you a notification when you save a travel entry.
